# @cloud-factory/cache

NestJS caching module backed by Redis with circuit-breaker resilience. Wraps `@nestjs/cache-manager` + `cache-manager-redis-yet`.

## Installation

```json
"@cloud-factory/cache": "*"
```

## Key Exports

- **`CloudFactoryCacheModule`** -- Global dynamic module that configures Redis-backed caching.
- **`ResilientCacheService`** -- Cache service with optional circuit-breaker (from `@cloud-factory/resilience`).
- **`RedisHealthIndicator`** -- Terminus health indicator for Redis.
- **`buildCacheKey(service, entity, id)`** -- Builds namespaced key: `cf:\{service\}:\{entity\}:\{id\}`
- **`buildCacheKeyPattern(service, entity)`** -- Builds glob pattern: `cf:\{service\}:\{entity\}:*`

## Usage

### Register in AppModule

```typescript
import { CloudFactoryCacheModule } from '@cloud-factory/cache';
import { ConfigService } from '@nestjs/config';

@Module({
  imports: [
    CloudFactoryCacheModule.forRootAsync({
      useFactory: (config: ConfigService) => ({
        redisUrl: config.get('REDIS_URL'),
        defaultTtl: 300, // seconds
        maxItems: 1000,
      }),
      inject: [ConfigService],
    }),
  ],
})
export class AppModule {}
```

### Use ResilientCacheService

```typescript
import { ResilientCacheService, buildCacheKey } from '@cloud-factory/cache';

@Injectable()
export class ProductService {
  constructor(private cache: ResilientCacheService) {}

  async getProduct(id: string) {
    const key = buildCacheKey('product', 'item', id);
    const cached = await this.cache.get<Product>(key);
    if (cached) return cached;

    const product = await this.repo.findOne(id);
    await this.cache.set(key, product, 60_000); // ttl in ms
    return product;
  }
}
```

## Peer Dependencies

`@nestjs/common`, `@nestjs/core`, `@nestjs/terminus`
